ItacPersonItem.Notes: According to Pietro Messina, `Gli storici italiani del Seicento`, in Storie inglesi, 2012, Davila was honorary member of the Venetian Incogniti. His biography by Gino Benzoni, is in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
